datasets.name: ds_usage
queryLines:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),
priced AS (
  SELECT u.usage_date, date_trunc('MONTH',u.usage_date) AS usage_month, u.workspace_id,
    o.workspace_name, o.lob, o.sub_division, o.team, o.environment, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product,
    CASE WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Job Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'Lakeflow / DLT'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
         ELSE 'Platform / Other' END AS compute_type,
    u.usage_metadata.cluster_id AS cluster_id, u.usage_metadata.job_id AS job_id, u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_quantity * try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id
  LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit
       AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time)
  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT usage_date, usage_month, lob, sub_division, team, workspace_name, environment, compute_type, round(sum(cost_usd),2) AS cost_usd FROM priced WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8

datasets.name: ds_score
queryLines:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),
priced AS (
  SELECT u.usage_date, date_trunc('MONTH',u.usage_date) AS usage_month, u.workspace_id,
    o.workspace_name, o.lob, o.sub_division, o.team, o.environment, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product,
    CASE WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Job Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'Lakeflow / DLT'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
         ELSE 'Platform / Other' END AS compute_type,
    u.usage_metadata.cluster_id AS cluster_id, u.usage_metadata.job_id AS job_id, u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_quantity * try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id
  LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit
       AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time)
  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
),
cl_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
node_util AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,date(start_time) d, avg(cpu_user_percent+cpu_system_percent) avg_cpu_pct, avg(mem_used_percent) avg_mem_pct, max(mem_used_percent) peak_mem_pct, count(*) node_minutes FROM system.compute.node_timeline WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE cluster_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment,
    coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id) cluster_id,
    cl.cluster_name, cl.cluster_source, coalesce(nu.d,cc.d) d,
    nu.avg_cpu_pct, nu.avg_mem_pct, nu.peak_mem_pct, nu.node_minutes, coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0) cost_usd, cl.dbr_version,
    greatest(0, 17 - try_cast(split(regexp_extract(cl.dbr_version,'(\\d+\\.\\d+)',1),'\\.')[0] AS INT)) major_versions_behind,
    (cl.aws_attributes.availability LIKE 'SPOT%') is_spot, cl.auto_termination_minutes, cl.min_autoscale_workers, cl.max_autoscale_workers,
    CASE WHEN nu.avg_cpu_pct IS NOT NULL THEN coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(nu.avg_cpu_pct,50)/50.0) ELSE 0 END idle_cpu_cost_usd
  FROM node_util nu FULL OUTER JOIN clu_cost cc USING (workspace_id,cluster_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN cl_latest cl ON cl.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) AND cl.cluster_id=coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id)
),
wh_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,workspace_id,warehouse_name,warehouse_type,warehouse_size,min_clusters,max_clusters,auto_stop_minutes, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.warehouses) WHERE rn=1),
wh_ev AS (SELECT warehouse_id,date(event_time) d, sum(CASE WHEN event_type NOT IN ('STOPPED','STOPPING') THEN timestampdiff(SECOND,event_time,next_time) ELSE 0 END) running_seconds FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,event_type,event_time, lead(event_time) OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY event_time) next_time FROM system.compute.warehouse_events WHERE event_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS) WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL AND date(event_time)=date(next_time) GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_q AS (SELECT compute.warehouse_id warehouse_id,date(start_time) d, count(*) query_count, sum(execution_duration_ms)/1000.0 exec_seconds, sum(spilled_local_bytes)/1e9 spilled_gb, sum(CASE WHEN execution_status='FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed_queries FROM system.query.history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_cost AS (SELECT warehouse_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE warehouse_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
whe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, wl.workspace_id, c.warehouse_id, wl.warehouse_name, wl.warehouse_type, wl.warehouse_size,
    wl.auto_stop_minutes, (coalesce(wl.auto_stop_minutes,0)=0) never_auto_stops, c.d, coalesce(c.cost_usd,0) cost_usd,
    e.running_seconds, q.query_count, q.exec_seconds, coalesce(q.spilled_gb,0) spilled_gb, coalesce(q.failed_queries,0) failed_queries,
    least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0)) utilization,
    coalesce(c.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0))) idle_cost_usd
  FROM wh_cost c LEFT JOIN wh_ev e ON e.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND e.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_q q ON q.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND q.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_latest wl ON wl.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=wl.workspace_id
),
job_cl AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source FROM (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
job_runs AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,run_id,date(period_start_time) d,result_state,compute_ids FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline WHERE period_start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS),
job_apc AS (SELECT r.workspace_id,r.job_id,r.d,r.run_id, max(CASE WHEN coalesce(c.cluster_source,'') NOT IN ('JOB','') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) used_apc, max(CASE WHEN r.result_state IN ('FAILED','ERROR','TIMED_OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed FROM job_runs r LEFT JOIN LATERAL explode(r.compute_ids) AS t(cid) LEFT JOIN job_cl c ON c.workspace_id=r.workspace_id AND c.cluster_id=t.cid GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
job_day AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,d, count(*) runs, sum(failed) failed_runs, max(used_apc) ran_on_apc FROM job_apc GROUP BY 1,2,3),
job_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) job_cost_usd FROM priced WHERE job_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
jobe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(jd.job_id,jc.job_id) job_id, coalesce(jd.d,jc.d) d,
    coalesce(jd.runs,0) runs, coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0) failed_runs, coalesce(jd.ran_on_apc,0) ran_on_apc, coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) job_cost_usd,
    CASE WHEN coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0)>0 THEN coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) ELSE 0 END failed_cost_usd
  FROM job_day jd FULL OUTER JOIN job_cost jc USING (workspace_id,job_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id)
),
sc_spend AS (SELECT workspace_id, usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) spend FROM priced WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 60 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
sc_ic AS (SELECT workspace_id,d,sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd) v FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-INTERVAL 60 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
sc_wi AS (SELECT workspace_id,d,sum(idle_cost_usd) v FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-INTERVAL 60 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
sc_jf AS (SELECT workspace_id,d,sum(failed_cost_usd) failed_v, sum(CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_cost_usd ELSE 0 END) apc_v FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-INTERVAL 60 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
sc_daily AS (SELECT coalesce(s.workspace_id,ic.workspace_id,wi.workspace_id,j.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(s.d,ic.d,wi.d,j.d) d, coalesce(s.spend,0) spend, coalesce(ic.v,0) idle_cpu_cost, coalesce(wi.v,0) wh_idle_cost, coalesce(j.failed_v,0) failed_cost, coalesce(j.apc_v,0) jobs_on_apc_cost FROM sc_spend s FULL OUTER JOIN sc_ic ic USING(workspace_id,d) FULL OUTER JOIN sc_wi wi USING(workspace_id,d) FULL OUTER JOIN sc_jf j USING(workspace_id,d)),
sc_agg AS (SELECT workspace_id, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN spend END) spend_cur, sum(CASE WHEN d<current_date()-30 THEN spend END) spend_prev, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN idle_cpu_cost+wh_idle_cost+failed_cost END) waste_cur, sum(CASE WHEN d<current_date()-30 THEN idle_cpu_cost+wh_idle_cost+failed_cost END) waste_prev, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN idle_cpu_cost END) idle_cpu_cost, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN wh_idle_cost END) wh_idle_cost, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN failed_cost END) failed_cost, sum(CASE WHEN d>=current_date()-30 THEN jobs_on_apc_cost END) jobs_on_apc_cost FROM sc_daily GROUP BY 1),
sc_scored AS (SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,a.workspace_id, round(coalesce(a.spend_cur,0)) total_spend, round(coalesce(a.idle_cpu_cost,0)) idle_cpu_cost, round(coalesce(a.wh_idle_cost,0)) wh_idle_cost, round(coalesce(a.failed_cost,0)) failed_cost, round(coalesce(a.jobs_on_apc_cost,0)) jobs_on_apc_cost, round(coalesce(a.waste_cur,0)) total_waste, round(100*coalesce(a.waste_cur,0)/nullif(a.spend_cur,0),1) waste_pct, round(100*(1-least(1,coalesce(a.waste_cur,0)/nullif(a.spend_cur,0))),1) efficiency_score, round(100*(1-least(1,coalesce(a.waste_prev,0)/nullif(a.spend_prev,0))),1) prior_efficiency_score FROM sc_agg a LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=a.workspace_id WHERE coalesce(a.spend_cur,0)>0),
scard AS (SELECT *, round(efficiency_score-prior_efficiency_score,1) score_delta, rank() OVER (ORDER BY efficiency_score DESC) rank_efficiency, rank() OVER (ORDER BY total_waste DESC) rank_waste, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY lob ORDER BY efficiency_score DESC) rank_in_lob FROM sc_scored)
SELECT lob, sub_division, team, workspace_name, total_spend, total_waste, waste_pct, efficiency_score, score_delta, idle_cpu_cost, wh_idle_cost, failed_cost, jobs_on_apc_cost, rank_efficiency, rank_waste FROM scard

),
cl_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
node_util AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,date(start_time) d, avg(cpu_user_percent+cpu_system_percent) avg_cpu_pct, avg(mem_used_percent) avg_mem_pct, max(mem_used_percent) peak_mem_pct, count(*) node_minutes FROM system.compute.node_timeline WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE cluster_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),

    coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id) cluster_id,

SELECT lob, sub_division, team, workspace_name, cluster_name, round(avg(avg_cpu_pct),1) avg_cpu_pct, round(avg(avg_mem_pct),1) avg_mem_pct, round(sum(cost_usd)) cost_usd, round(sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd)) idle_cost, max(major_versions_behind) versions_behind, max(is_spot) is_spot, min(auto_termination_minutes) auto_stop_min FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND cluster_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>0

  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
),
job_cl AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source FROM (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
job_runs AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,run_id,date(period_start_time) d,result_state,compute_ids FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline WHERE period_start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS),

    coalesce(jd.runs,0) runs, coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0) failed_runs, coalesce(jd.ran_on_apc,0) ran_on_apc, coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) job_cost_usd,
    CASE WHEN coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0)>0 THEN coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) ELSE 0 END failed_cost_usd
  FROM job_day jd FULL OUTER JOIN job_cost jc USING (workspace_id,job_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id)
)
SELECT lob, sub_division, team, workspace_name, job_id, sum(runs) runs, sum(failed_runs) failed_runs, round(sum(job_cost_usd)) cost_usd, round(sum(failed_cost_usd)) failed_cost, max(ran_on_apc) ran_on_apc FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND job_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 HAVING sum(job_cost_usd)>0 OR sum(failed_cost_usd)>0

datasets.name: ds_wh
queryLines:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),
priced AS (
  SELECT u.usage_date, date_trunc('MONTH',u.usage_date) AS usage_month, u.workspace_id,
    o.workspace_name, o.lob, o.sub_division, o.team, o.environment, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product,
    CASE WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Job Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'Lakeflow / DLT'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
         ELSE 'Platform / Other' END AS compute_type,
    u.usage_metadata.cluster_id AS cluster_id, u.usage_metadata.job_id AS job_id, u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_quantity * try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id
  LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit
       AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time)
  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
),
wh_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,workspace_id,warehouse_name,warehouse_type,warehouse_size,min_clusters,max_clusters,auto_stop_minutes, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.warehouses) WHERE rn=1),
wh_ev AS (SELECT warehouse_id,date(event_time) d, sum(CASE WHEN event_type NOT IN ('STOPPED','STOPPING') THEN timestampdiff(SECOND,event_time,next_time) ELSE 0 END) running_seconds FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,event_type,event_time, lead(event_time) OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY event_time) next_time FROM system.compute.warehouse_events WHERE event_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS) WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL AND date(event_time)=date(next_time) GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_q AS (SELECT compute.warehouse_id warehouse_id,date(start_time) d, count(*) query_count, sum(execution_duration_ms)/1000.0 exec_seconds, sum(spilled_local_bytes)/1e9 spilled_gb, sum(CASE WHEN execution_status='FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed_queries FROM system.query.history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_cost AS (SELECT warehouse_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE warehouse_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
whe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, wl.workspace_id, c.warehouse_id, wl.warehouse_name, wl.warehouse_type, wl.warehouse_size,
    wl.auto_stop_minutes, (coalesce(wl.auto_stop_minutes,0)=0) never_auto_stops, c.d, coalesce(c.cost_usd,0) cost_usd,
    e.running_seconds, q.query_count, q.exec_seconds, coalesce(q.spilled_gb,0) spilled_gb, coalesce(q.failed_queries,0) failed_queries,
    least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0)) utilization,
    coalesce(c.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0))) idle_cost_usd
  FROM wh_cost c LEFT JOIN wh_ev e ON e.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND e.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_q q ON q.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND q.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_latest wl ON wl.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=wl.workspace_id
)
SELECT lob, sub_division, team, workspace_name, warehouse_name, warehouse_size, auto_stop_minutes, never_auto_stops, round(sum(cost_usd)) cost_usd, round(sum(idle_cost_usd)) idle_cost, round(avg(utilization)*100,1) util_pct, round(sum(spilled_gb)) spilled_gb FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND warehouse_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>0

datasets.name: ds_reco
queryLines:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),
priced AS (
  SELECT u.usage_date, date_trunc('MONTH',u.usage_date) AS usage_month, u.workspace_id,
    o.workspace_name, o.lob, o.sub_division, o.team, o.environment, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product,
    CASE WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Job Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'Lakeflow / DLT'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
         ELSE 'Platform / Other' END AS compute_type,
    u.usage_metadata.cluster_id AS cluster_id, u.usage_metadata.job_id AS job_id, u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_quantity * try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id
  LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit
       AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time)
  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
),
cl_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
node_util AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,date(start_time) d, avg(cpu_user_percent+cpu_system_percent) avg_cpu_pct, avg(mem_used_percent) avg_mem_pct, max(mem_used_percent) peak_mem_pct, count(*) node_minutes FROM system.compute.node_timeline WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE cluster_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment,
    coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id) cluster_id,
    cl.cluster_name, cl.cluster_source, coalesce(nu.d,cc.d) d,
    nu.avg_cpu_pct, nu.avg_mem_pct, nu.peak_mem_pct, nu.node_minutes, coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0) cost_usd, cl.dbr_version,
    greatest(0, 17 - try_cast(split(regexp_extract(cl.dbr_version,'(\\d+\\.\\d+)',1),'\\.')[0] AS INT)) major_versions_behind,
    (cl.aws_attributes.availability LIKE 'SPOT%') is_spot, cl.auto_termination_minutes, cl.min_autoscale_workers, cl.max_autoscale_workers,
    CASE WHEN nu.avg_cpu_pct IS NOT NULL THEN coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(nu.avg_cpu_pct,50)/50.0) ELSE 0 END idle_cpu_cost_usd
  FROM node_util nu FULL OUTER JOIN clu_cost cc USING (workspace_id,cluster_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN cl_latest cl ON cl.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) AND cl.cluster_id=coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id)
),
wh_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,workspace_id,warehouse_name,warehouse_type,warehouse_size,min_clusters,max_clusters,auto_stop_minutes, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.warehouses) WHERE rn=1),
wh_ev AS (SELECT warehouse_id,date(event_time) d, sum(CASE WHEN event_type NOT IN ('STOPPED','STOPPING') THEN timestampdiff(SECOND,event_time,next_time) ELSE 0 END) running_seconds FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,event_type,event_time, lead(event_time) OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY event_time) next_time FROM system.compute.warehouse_events WHERE event_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS) WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL AND date(event_time)=date(next_time) GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_q AS (SELECT compute.warehouse_id warehouse_id,date(start_time) d, count(*) query_count, sum(execution_duration_ms)/1000.0 exec_seconds, sum(spilled_local_bytes)/1e9 spilled_gb, sum(CASE WHEN execution_status='FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed_queries FROM system.query.history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_cost AS (SELECT warehouse_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE warehouse_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
whe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, wl.workspace_id, c.warehouse_id, wl.warehouse_name, wl.warehouse_type, wl.warehouse_size,
    wl.auto_stop_minutes, (coalesce(wl.auto_stop_minutes,0)=0) never_auto_stops, c.d, coalesce(c.cost_usd,0) cost_usd,
    e.running_seconds, q.query_count, q.exec_seconds, coalesce(q.spilled_gb,0) spilled_gb, coalesce(q.failed_queries,0) failed_queries,
    least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0)) utilization,
    coalesce(c.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0))) idle_cost_usd
  FROM wh_cost c LEFT JOIN wh_ev e ON e.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND e.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_q q ON q.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND q.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_latest wl ON wl.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=wl.workspace_id
),
job_cl AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source FROM (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
job_runs AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,run_id,date(period_start_time) d,result_state,compute_ids FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline WHERE period_start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS),
job_apc AS (SELECT r.workspace_id,r.job_id,r.d,r.run_id, max(CASE WHEN coalesce(c.cluster_source,'') NOT IN ('JOB','') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) used_apc, max(CASE WHEN r.result_state IN ('FAILED','ERROR','TIMED_OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed FROM job_runs r LEFT JOIN LATERAL explode(r.compute_ids) AS t(cid) LEFT JOIN job_cl c ON c.workspace_id=r.workspace_id AND c.cluster_id=t.cid GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
job_day AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,d, count(*) runs, sum(failed) failed_runs, max(used_apc) ran_on_apc FROM job_apc GROUP BY 1,2,3),
job_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) job_cost_usd FROM priced WHERE job_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
jobe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(jd.job_id,jc.job_id) job_id, coalesce(jd.d,jc.d) d,
    coalesce(jd.runs,0) runs, coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0) failed_runs, coalesce(jd.ran_on_apc,0) ran_on_apc, coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) job_cost_usd,
    CASE WHEN coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0)>0 THEN coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) ELSE 0 END failed_cost_usd
  FROM job_day jd FULL OUTER JOIN job_cost jc USING (workspace_id,job_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id)
),lwr AS (SELECT target_table_catalog c,target_table_schema s,target_table_name t,workspace_id,count(*) cnt,max(event_date) lw FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE target_table_name IS NOT NULL AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL AND event_date>=current_date()-90 AND target_table_catalog NOT IN ('system','__databricks_internal') AND target_table_schema<>'information_schema' AND NOT startswith(target_table_name,'_') AND NOT startswith(target_table_name,'tmp') GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
ltw AS (SELECT c,s,t,workspace_id,lw,sum(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY c,s,t) tot_writes FROM (SELECT *,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY c,s,t ORDER BY cnt DESC) rn FROM lwr) WHERE rn=1),
lrd AS (SELECT source_table_catalog c,source_table_schema s,source_table_name t,max(event_date) last_read FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE source_table_name IS NOT NULL AND event_date>=current_date()-365 GROUP BY 1,2,3),
lpo AS (SELECT DISTINCT catalog_name c,schema_name s,table_name t FROM system.storage.predictive_optimization_operations_history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-30),
lfact AS (SELECT concat(tw.c,'.',tw.s,'.',tw.t) table_full, o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team, r.last_read, tw.lw last_write, tw.tot_writes, CASE WHEN lpo.t IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END po_running, CASE WHEN r.last_read IS NULL OR r.last_read<current_date()-90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END is_unused FROM ltw tw JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=tw.workspace_id LEFT JOIN lrd r ON r.c=tw.c AND r.s=tw.s AND r.t=tw.t LEFT JOIN lpo ON lpo.c=tw.c AND lpo.s=tw.s AND lpo.t=tw.t),
recs AS (
SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste' tier,'Idle clusters' category,'All-Purpose' compute_type, round(sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd)) est_monthly_savings,'Dashboard' fix_path, concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' clusters, avg CPU ',round(avg(avg_cpu_pct),0),'%') detail FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND avg_cpu_pct<30 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Idle warehouses','SQL', round(sum(idle_cost_usd)),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT warehouse_id),' warehouses, avg util ',round(avg(utilization)*100,0),'%') FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(idle_cost_usd)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Failing jobs','Jobs & Lakeflow', round(sum(failed_cost_usd)),'Dashboard', concat(sum(failed_runs),' failed runs in 30d') FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(failed_cost_usd)>25
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Unused warehouses','SQL', round(sum(cost_usd)),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT warehouse_id),' warehouses with cost but ~0 queries (de-commission)') FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>100 AND sum(coalesce(query_count,0))=0
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Over-frequent jobs','Jobs & Lakeflow', round(sum(job_cost_usd)*0.2),'Dashboard', concat(sum(runs),' runs/30d - consider lower refresh cadence') FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(runs)>1000 AND sum(job_cost_usd)>100
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','Right-size VM / instance type','All-Purpose', round(sum(cost_usd)*0.3),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' clusters low CPU+mem (avg CPU ',round(avg(avg_cpu_pct),0),'%, mem ',round(avg(avg_mem_pct),0),'%) - smaller instance') FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND avg_cpu_pct<20 AND avg_mem_pct<30 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>100
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','Oversized warehouses','SQL', round(sum(cost_usd)*0.3),'Dashboard', concat('avg util ',round(avg(utilization)*100,0),'% on ',max(warehouse_size)) FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND warehouse_size IN ('Large','X-Large','2X-Large','3X-Large','4X-Large') AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING avg(utilization)<0.2 AND sum(cost_usd)>100
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','Jobs on all-purpose compute','Jobs & Lakeflow', round(sum(CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_cost_usd ELSE 0 END)*0.5),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_id END),' jobs on all-purpose') FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_cost_usd ELSE 0 END)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','No spot-with-fallback','All-Purpose', round(sum(cost_usd)*0.3),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' on-demand clusters eligible for spot') FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND is_spot=false AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>100
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','Autoscaling disabled','All-Purpose', CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' fixed-size clusters (min=max)') FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND max_autoscale_workers=min_autoscale_workers AND max_autoscale_workers>1 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Optimize data & code','High query spill','SQL', CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE),'Genie / Assistant', concat(round(sum(spilled_gb)),' GB spilled - upsize or tune queries (ask Genie)') FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(spilled_gb)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Optimize data & code','Outdated runtime','All-Purpose', CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE),'Genie / Assistant', concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' clusters >=2 LTS behind') FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND major_versions_behind>=2 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING count(DISTINCT cluster_id)>0

UNION ALL SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,max(o.workspace_name) workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Set query timeout (long-running queries)','SQL', round(count(*)*0.5),'Dashboard', concat(count(*),' queries ran >1h in 30d - set a statement/query timeout') FROM system.query.history qh JOIN org o USING (workspace_id) WHERE qh.start_time>=current_date()-30 AND qh.total_duration_ms>3600000 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,'—' workspace_name,'Reduce waste' tier,'De-commission unused tables' category,'Data' compute_type, round(count(*)*0.10) est_monthly_savings,'Dashboard' fix_path, concat(count(*),' tables written but not read in 90d') detail FROM lfact WHERE is_unused=1 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
 UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,'—','Optimize data & code','Enable predictive optimization','Data', round(count(*)*0.05),'Dashboard', concat(count(*),' tables without predictive optimization running') FROM lfact WHERE po_running=0 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
 UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,'—','Optimize data & code','Optimize frequently-rewritten tables','Data', round(count(*)*0.20),'Genie / Assistant', concat(count(*),' tables rewritten heavily (>500x/90d)') FROM lfact WHERE tot_writes>500 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
) SELECT *, CASE WHEN est_monthly_savings IS NULL THEN 'Signal' WHEN est_monthly_savings>=5000 THEN 'High' WHEN est_monthly_savings>=500 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END severity FROM recs WHERE team IS NOT NULL AND lob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY est_monthly_savings DESC NULLS LAST

         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
         ELSE 'Platform / Other' END AS compute_type,
    u.usage_metadata.cluster_id AS cluster_id, u.usage_metadata.job_id AS job_id, u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_quantity * try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id
  LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit
       AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time)
  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
),
cl_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
node_util AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,date(start_time) d, avg(cpu_user_percent+cpu_system_percent) avg_cpu_pct, avg(mem_used_percent) avg_mem_pct, max(mem_used_percent) peak_mem_pct, count(*) node_minutes FROM system.compute.node_timeline WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE cluster_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment,
    coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id) cluster_id,
    cl.cluster_name, cl.cluster_source, coalesce(nu.d,cc.d) d,
    nu.avg_cpu_pct, nu.avg_mem_pct, nu.peak_mem_pct, nu.node_minutes, coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0) cost_usd, cl.dbr_version,
    greatest(0, 17 - try_cast(split(regexp_extract(cl.dbr_version,'(\\d+\\.\\d+)',1),'\\.')[0] AS INT)) major_versions_behind,
    (cl.aws_attributes.availability LIKE 'SPOT%') is_spot, cl.auto_termination_minutes, cl.min_autoscale_workers, cl.max_autoscale_workers,
    CASE WHEN nu.avg_cpu_pct IS NOT NULL THEN coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(nu.avg_cpu_pct,50)/50.0) ELSE 0 END idle_cpu_cost_usd
  FROM node_util nu FULL OUTER JOIN clu_cost cc USING (workspace_id,cluster_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN cl_latest cl ON cl.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) AND cl.cluster_id=coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id)
),
wh_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,workspace_id,warehouse_name,warehouse_type,warehouse_size,min_clusters,max_clusters,auto_stop_minutes, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.warehouses) WHERE rn=1),
wh_ev AS (SELECT warehouse_id,date(event_time) d, sum(CASE WHEN event_type NOT IN ('STOPPED','STOPPING') THEN timestampdiff(SECOND,event_time,next_time) ELSE 0 END) running_seconds FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,event_type,event_time, lead(event_time) OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY event_time) next_time FROM system.compute.warehouse_events WHERE event_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS) WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL AND date(event_time)=date(next_time) GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_q AS (SELECT compute.warehouse_id warehouse_id,date(start_time) d, count(*) query_count, sum(execution_duration_ms)/1000.0 exec_seconds, sum(spilled_local_bytes)/1e9 spilled_gb, sum(CASE WHEN execution_status='FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed_queries FROM system.query.history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_cost AS (SELECT warehouse_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE warehouse_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
whe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, wl.workspace_id, c.warehouse_id, wl.warehouse_name, wl.warehouse_type, wl.warehouse_size,
    wl.auto_stop_minutes, (coalesce(wl.auto_stop_minutes,0)=0) never_auto_stops, c.d, coalesce(c.cost_usd,0) cost_usd,
    e.running_seconds, q.query_count, q.exec_seconds, coalesce(q.spilled_gb,0) spilled_gb, coalesce(q.failed_queries,0) failed_queries,
    least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0)) utilization,
    coalesce(c.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0))) idle_cost_usd
  FROM wh_cost c LEFT JOIN wh_ev e ON e.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND e.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_q q ON q.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND q.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_latest wl ON wl.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=wl.workspace_id
),
job_cl AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source FROM (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
job_runs AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,run_id,date(period_start_time) d,result_state,compute_ids FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline WHERE period_start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS),
job_apc AS (SELECT r.workspace_id,r.job_id,r.d,r.run_id, max(CASE WHEN coalesce(c.cluster_source,'') NOT IN ('JOB','') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) used_apc, max(CASE WHEN r.result_state IN ('FAILED','ERROR','TIMED_OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed FROM job_runs r LEFT JOIN LATERAL explode(r.compute_ids) AS t(cid) LEFT JOIN job_cl c ON c.workspace_id=r.workspace_id AND c.cluster_id=t.cid GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
job_day AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,d, count(*) runs, sum(failed) failed_runs, max(used_apc) ran_on_apc FROM job_apc GROUP BY 1,2,3),
job_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) job_cost_usd FROM priced WHERE job_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
jobe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(jd.job_id,jc.job_id) job_id, coalesce(jd.d,jc.d) d,
    coalesce(jd.runs,0) runs, coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0) failed_runs, coalesce(jd.ran_on_apc,0) ran_on_apc, coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) job_cost_usd,
    CASE WHEN coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0)>0 THEN coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) ELSE 0 END failed_cost_usd
  FROM job_day jd FULL OUTER JOIN job_cost jc USING (workspace_id,job_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id)
)
SELECT u.lob,u.sub_division,u.environment, u.total_cost,u.total_dbu,u.apc_cost,u.job_cost,u.sql_cost,u.ai_cost,u.dlt_cost,u.serverless_cost, c.idle_cpu_cost,c.avg_cpu_pct,c.avg_mem_pct,c.avg_versions_behind,c.spot_pct, w.wh_idle_cost,w.wh_cost,w.wh_util_pct, j.failed_cost,j.failed_runs,j.runs,j.job_success_pct,
   (coalesce(c.idle_cpu_cost,0)+coalesce(w.wh_idle_cost,0)+coalesce(j.failed_cost,0)) total_waste,
   100*(1-least(1,(coalesce(c.idle_cpu_cost,0)+coalesce(w.wh_idle_cost,0)+coalesce(j.failed_cost,0))/nullif(u.total_cost,0))) efficiency_score
   FROM (SELECT lob,sub_division,environment, sum(cost_usd) total_cost, sum(usage_quantity) total_dbu,
     sum(CASE WHEN compute_type='All-Purpose Compute' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END) apc_cost, sum(CASE WHEN compute_type='Job Compute' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END) job_cost,
     sum(CASE WHEN compute_type='SQL Warehouse' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END) sql_cost, sum(CASE WHEN compute_type='AI / ML' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END) ai_cost,
     sum(CASE WHEN compute_type='Lakeflow / DLT' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END) dlt_cost, sum(CASE WHEN compute_type='Serverless Interactive' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END) serverless_cost
     FROM priced WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3) u
   FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT lob,sub_division,environment, sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd) idle_cpu_cost, avg(avg_cpu_pct) avg_cpu_pct, avg(avg_mem_pct) avg_mem_pct, avg(major_versions_behind) avg_versions_behind, avg(CASE WHEN is_spot THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)*100 spot_pct FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3) c USING (lob,sub_division,environment)
   FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT lob,sub_division,environment, sum(idle_cost_usd) wh_idle_cost, sum(cost_usd) wh_cost, avg(utilization)*100 wh_util_pct FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3) w USING (lob,sub_division,environment)
   FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT lob,sub_division,environment, sum(failed_cost_usd) failed_cost, sum(failed_runs) failed_runs, sum(runs) runs, (1-sum(failed_runs)/nullif(sum(runs),0))*100 job_success_pct FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3) j USING (lob,sub_division,environment)

WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),
priced AS (
  SELECT u.usage_date, date_trunc('MONTH',u.usage_date) AS usage_month, u.workspace_id,
    o.workspace_name, o.lob, o.sub_division, o.team, o.environment, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product,
    CASE WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Job Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'Lakeflow / DLT'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
         ELSE 'Platform / Other' END AS compute_type,
    u.usage_metadata.cluster_id AS cluster_id, u.usage_metadata.job_id AS job_id, u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_quantity * try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id
  LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit
       AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time)
  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
),
job_cl AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source FROM (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
job_runs AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,run_id,date(period_start_time) d,result_state,compute_ids FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline WHERE period_start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS),
job_apc AS (SELECT r.workspace_id,r.job_id,r.d,r.run_id, max(CASE WHEN coalesce(c.cluster_source,'') NOT IN ('JOB','') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) used_apc, max(CASE WHEN r.result_state IN ('FAILED','ERROR','TIMED_OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed FROM job_runs r LEFT JOIN LATERAL explode(r.compute_ids) AS t(cid) LEFT JOIN job_cl c ON c.workspace_id=r.workspace_id AND c.cluster_id=t.cid GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
job_day AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,d, count(*) runs, sum(failed) failed_runs, max(used_apc) ran_on_apc FROM job_apc GROUP BY 1,2,3),
job_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) job_cost_usd FROM priced WHERE job_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
jobe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(jd.job_id,jc.job_id) job_id, coalesce(jd.d,jc.d) d,
    coalesce(jd.runs,0) runs, coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0) failed_runs, coalesce(jd.ran_on_apc,0) ran_on_apc, coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) job_cost_usd,
    CASE WHEN coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0)>0 THEN coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) ELSE 0 END failed_cost_usd
  FROM job_day jd FULL OUTER JOIN job_cost jc USING (workspace_id,job_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id)
)
SELECT je.lob,je.sub_division,je.team, coalesce(jn.name,je.job_id) job_label, round(sum(je.job_cost_usd)) cost_usd, round(sum(je.failed_cost_usd)) failed_cost, sum(je.failed_runs) failed_runs FROM jobe je LEFT JOIN (SELECT job_id, max_by(name,change_time) name FROM system.lakeflow.jobs GROUP BY job_id) jn ON jn.job_id=je.job_id WHERE je.d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 15

WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id, coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,

        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN u.sku_name ILIKE '%GENIE%' THEN 'AI / ML'
  WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'

  WHEN u.billing_origin_product='APPS' THEN 'Apps'

  WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
  ELSE 'Platform / Other' END compute_type, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product, o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name, round(sum(u.usage_quantity*try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double))) cost_usd, round(sum(u.usage_quantity)) dbu FROM system.billing.usage u JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time) WHERE u.usage_date>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7) WHERE compute_type='Lakebase / OLTP'

datasets.name: ds_platform
queryLines:
WITH org AS (

    coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') sub_division, coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division, max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN u.sku_name ILIKE '%GENIE%' THEN 'AI / ML'
  WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'
  WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Job Compute'
  WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'Lakeflow / DLT'
  WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
  WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
  WHEN u.billing_origin_product='APPS' THEN 'Apps'
  WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
  WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
  ELSE 'Platform / Other' END compute_type, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product, o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name, round(sum(u.usage_quantity*try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double))) cost_usd, round(sum(u.usage_quantity)) dbu FROM system.billing.usage u JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time) WHERE u.usage_date>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7) WHERE compute_type='Platform / Other'

datasets.name: ds_data_agg
queryLines:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),lwr AS (SELECT target_table_catalog c,target_table_schema s,target_table_name t,workspace_id,count(*) cnt,max(event_date) lw FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE target_table_name IS NOT NULL AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL AND event_date>=current_date()-90 AND target_table_catalog NOT IN ('system','__databricks_internal') AND target_table_schema<>'information_schema' AND NOT startswith(target_table_name,'_') AND NOT startswith(target_table_name,'tmp') GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
ltw AS (SELECT c,s,t,workspace_id,lw,sum(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY c,s,t) tot_writes FROM (SELECT *,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY c,s,t ORDER BY cnt DESC) rn FROM lwr) WHERE rn=1),
lrd AS (SELECT source_table_catalog c,source_table_schema s,source_table_name t,max(event_date) last_read FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE source_table_name IS NOT NULL AND event_date>=current_date()-365 GROUP BY 1,2,3),
lpo AS (SELECT DISTINCT catalog_name c,schema_name s,table_name t FROM system.storage.predictive_optimization_operations_history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-30),
lfact AS (SELECT concat(tw.c,'.',tw.s,'.',tw.t) table_full, o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team, r.last_read, tw.lw last_write, tw.tot_writes, CASE WHEN lpo.t IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END po_running, CASE WHEN r.last_read IS NULL OR r.last_read<current_date()-90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END is_unused FROM ltw tw JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=tw.workspace_id LEFT JOIN lrd r ON r.c=tw.c AND r.s=tw.s AND r.t=tw.t LEFT JOIN lpo ON lpo.c=tw.c AND lpo.s=tw.s AND lpo.t=tw.t) SELECT team,lob,count(*) tables, sum(is_unused) unused, sum(po_running) po_on FROM lfact GROUP BY team,lob

datasets.name: ds_data_recs
queryLines:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),lwr AS (SELECT target_table_catalog c,target_table_schema s,target_table_name t,workspace_id,count(*) cnt,max(event_date) lw FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE target_table_name IS NOT NULL AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL AND event_date>=current_date()-90 AND target_table_catalog NOT IN ('system','__databricks_internal') AND target_table_schema<>'information_schema' AND NOT startswith(target_table_name,'_') AND NOT startswith(target_table_name,'tmp') GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
ltw AS (SELECT c,s,t,workspace_id,lw,sum(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY c,s,t) tot_writes FROM (SELECT *,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY c,s,t ORDER BY cnt DESC) rn FROM lwr) WHERE rn=1),
lrd AS (SELECT source_table_catalog c,source_table_schema s,source_table_name t,max(event_date) last_read FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE source_table_name IS NOT NULL AND event_date>=current_date()-365 GROUP BY 1,2,3),
lpo AS (SELECT DISTINCT catalog_name c,schema_name s,table_name t FROM system.storage.predictive_optimization_operations_history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-30),
lfact AS (SELECT concat(tw.c,'.',tw.s,'.',tw.t) table_full, o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team, r.last_read, tw.lw last_write, tw.tot_writes, CASE WHEN lpo.t IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END po_running, CASE WHEN r.last_read IS NULL OR r.last_read<current_date()-90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END is_unused FROM ltw tw JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=tw.workspace_id LEFT JOIN lrd r ON r.c=tw.c AND r.s=tw.s AND r.t=tw.t LEFT JOIN lpo ON lpo.c=tw.c AND lpo.s=tw.s AND lpo.t=tw.t), r AS (SELECT lob,sub_division,team,'—' workspace_name,'Reduce waste' tier,'De-commission unused tables' category,'Data' compute_type, round(count(*)*0.10) est_monthly_savings,'Dashboard' fix_path, concat(count(*),' tables written but not read in 90d') detail FROM lfact WHERE is_unused=1 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
 UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,'—','Optimize data & code','Enable predictive optimization','Data', round(count(*)*0.05),'Dashboard', concat(count(*),' tables without predictive optimization running') FROM lfact WHERE po_running=0 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
 UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,'—','Optimize data & code','Optimize frequently-rewritten tables','Data', round(count(*)*0.20),'Genie / Assistant', concat(count(*),' tables rewritten heavily (>500x/90d)') FROM lfact WHERE tot_writes>500 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0) SELECT *, CASE WHEN est_monthly_savings IS NULL THEN 'Signal' WHEN est_monthly_savings>=5000 THEN 'High' WHEN est_monthly_savings>=500 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END severity FROM r

datasets.name: ds_leaderboard
queryLines:
WITH org AS (
  SELECT t.workspace_id,
         coalesce(w.workspace_name, concat('ws-', t.workspace_id)) AS workspace_name,
         coalesce(t.lob,'Untagged') AS lob, coalesce(t.sub_division,'Untagged') AS sub_division,
         coalesce(t.team,'Untagged') AS team, coalesce(t.environment,'Unknown') AS environment
  FROM (SELECT workspace_id, max(custom_tags['lob']) lob, max(custom_tags['sub_division']) sub_division,
               max(custom_tags['team']) team, max(custom_tags['environment']) environment
        FROM system.billing.usage WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-90 AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace_id) t
  LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w USING (workspace_id)
),
priced AS (
  SELECT u.usage_date, date_trunc('MONTH',u.usage_date) AS usage_month, u.workspace_id,
    o.workspace_name, o.lob, o.sub_division, o.team, o.environment, u.sku_name, u.billing_origin_product,
    CASE WHEN u.billing_origin_product='ALL_PURPOSE' THEN 'All-Purpose Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='JOBS' THEN 'Job Compute'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='DLT' THEN 'Lakeflow / DLT'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='SQL' THEN 'SQL Warehouse'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('MODEL_SERVING','AI_GATEWAY','AI_FUNCTIONS','AI_RUNTIME','VECTOR_SEARCH','AGENT_BRICKS','AGENT_EVALUATION','SUPERVISOR_AGENT') THEN 'AI / ML'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product='INTERACTIVE' THEN 'Serverless Interactive'
         WHEN u.billing_origin_product IN ('LAKEBASE','DATABASE','ONLINE_TABLES') THEN 'Lakebase / OLTP'
         ELSE 'Platform / Other' END AS compute_type,
    u.usage_metadata.cluster_id AS cluster_id, u.usage_metadata.job_id AS job_id, u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    u.product_features.is_serverless AS is_serverless, u.usage_quantity,
    u.usage_quantity * try_cast(lp.pricing.default AS double) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  JOIN org o ON u.workspace_id=o.workspace_id
  LEFT JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.sku_name=lp.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=lp.usage_unit
       AND u.usage_end_time>=lp.price_start_time AND (lp.price_end_time IS NULL OR u.usage_end_time<lp.price_end_time)
  WHERE u.workspace_id IS NOT NULL
),
cl_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
node_util AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,date(start_time) d, avg(cpu_user_percent+cpu_system_percent) avg_cpu_pct, avg(mem_used_percent) avg_mem_pct, max(mem_used_percent) peak_mem_pct, count(*) node_minutes FROM system.compute.node_timeline WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE cluster_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
clu AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment,
    coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id) cluster_id,
    cl.cluster_name, cl.cluster_source, coalesce(nu.d,cc.d) d,
    nu.avg_cpu_pct, nu.avg_mem_pct, nu.peak_mem_pct, nu.node_minutes, coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0) cost_usd, cl.dbr_version,
    greatest(0, 17 - try_cast(split(regexp_extract(cl.dbr_version,'(\\d+\\.\\d+)',1),'\\.')[0] AS INT)) major_versions_behind,
    (cl.aws_attributes.availability LIKE 'SPOT%') is_spot, cl.auto_termination_minutes, cl.min_autoscale_workers, cl.max_autoscale_workers,
    CASE WHEN nu.avg_cpu_pct IS NOT NULL THEN coalesce(cc.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(nu.avg_cpu_pct,50)/50.0) ELSE 0 END idle_cpu_cost_usd
  FROM node_util nu FULL OUTER JOIN clu_cost cc USING (workspace_id,cluster_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN cl_latest cl ON cl.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id) AND cl.cluster_id=coalesce(nu.cluster_id,cc.cluster_id)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(nu.workspace_id,cc.workspace_id)
),
wh_latest AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,workspace_id,warehouse_name,warehouse_type,warehouse_size,min_clusters,max_clusters,auto_stop_minutes, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.warehouses) WHERE rn=1),
wh_ev AS (SELECT warehouse_id,date(event_time) d, sum(CASE WHEN event_type NOT IN ('STOPPED','STOPPING') THEN timestampdiff(SECOND,event_time,next_time) ELSE 0 END) running_seconds FROM (SELECT warehouse_id,event_type,event_time, lead(event_time) OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY event_time) next_time FROM system.compute.warehouse_events WHERE event_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS) WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL AND date(event_time)=date(next_time) GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_q AS (SELECT compute.warehouse_id warehouse_id,date(start_time) d, count(*) query_count, sum(execution_duration_ms)/1000.0 exec_seconds, sum(spilled_local_bytes)/1e9 spilled_gb, sum(CASE WHEN execution_status='FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed_queries FROM system.query.history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2),
wh_cost AS (SELECT warehouse_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) cost_usd FROM priced WHERE warehouse_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2),
whe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, wl.workspace_id, c.warehouse_id, wl.warehouse_name, wl.warehouse_type, wl.warehouse_size,
    wl.auto_stop_minutes, (coalesce(wl.auto_stop_minutes,0)=0) never_auto_stops, c.d, coalesce(c.cost_usd,0) cost_usd,
    e.running_seconds, q.query_count, q.exec_seconds, coalesce(q.spilled_gb,0) spilled_gb, coalesce(q.failed_queries,0) failed_queries,
    least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0)) utilization,
    coalesce(c.cost_usd,0)*(1-least(1.0, coalesce(q.exec_seconds,0)/nullif(e.running_seconds,0))) idle_cost_usd
  FROM wh_cost c LEFT JOIN wh_ev e ON e.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND e.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_q q ON q.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id AND q.d=c.d
  LEFT JOIN wh_latest wl ON wl.warehouse_id=c.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=wl.workspace_id
),
job_cl AS (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source FROM (SELECT workspace_id,cluster_id,cluster_source, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id,cluster_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn FROM system.compute.clusters) WHERE rn=1),
job_runs AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,run_id,date(period_start_time) d,result_state,compute_ids FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline WHERE period_start_time>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS),
job_apc AS (SELECT r.workspace_id,r.job_id,r.d,r.run_id, max(CASE WHEN coalesce(c.cluster_source,'') NOT IN ('JOB','') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) used_apc, max(CASE WHEN r.result_state IN ('FAILED','ERROR','TIMED_OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failed FROM job_runs r LEFT JOIN LATERAL explode(r.compute_ids) AS t(cid) LEFT JOIN job_cl c ON c.workspace_id=r.workspace_id AND c.cluster_id=t.cid GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
job_day AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,d, count(*) runs, sum(failed) failed_runs, max(used_apc) ran_on_apc FROM job_apc GROUP BY 1,2,3),
job_cost AS (SELECT workspace_id,job_id,usage_date d, sum(cost_usd) job_cost_usd FROM priced WHERE job_id IS NOT NULL AND usage_date>=current_date()-INTERVAL 65 DAYS GROUP BY 1,2,3),
jobe AS (
  SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,o.workspace_name,o.environment, coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id) workspace_id, coalesce(jd.job_id,jc.job_id) job_id, coalesce(jd.d,jc.d) d,
    coalesce(jd.runs,0) runs, coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0) failed_runs, coalesce(jd.ran_on_apc,0) ran_on_apc, coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) job_cost_usd,
    CASE WHEN coalesce(jd.failed_runs,0)>0 THEN coalesce(jc.job_cost_usd,0) ELSE 0 END failed_cost_usd
  FROM job_day jd FULL OUTER JOIN job_cost jc USING (workspace_id,job_id,d)
  LEFT JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=coalesce(jd.workspace_id,jc.workspace_id)
),lwr AS (SELECT target_table_catalog c,target_table_schema s,target_table_name t,workspace_id,count(*) cnt,max(event_date) lw FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE target_table_name IS NOT NULL AND workspace_id IS NOT NULL AND event_date>=current_date()-90 AND target_table_catalog NOT IN ('system','__databricks_internal') AND target_table_schema<>'information_schema' AND NOT startswith(target_table_name,'_') AND NOT startswith(target_table_name,'tmp') GROUP BY 1,2,3,4),
ltw AS (SELECT c,s,t,workspace_id,lw,sum(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY c,s,t) tot_writes FROM (SELECT *,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY c,s,t ORDER BY cnt DESC) rn FROM lwr) WHERE rn=1),
lrd AS (SELECT source_table_catalog c,source_table_schema s,source_table_name t,max(event_date) last_read FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE source_table_name IS NOT NULL AND event_date>=current_date()-365 GROUP BY 1,2,3),
lpo AS (SELECT DISTINCT catalog_name c,schema_name s,table_name t FROM system.storage.predictive_optimization_operations_history WHERE start_time>=current_date()-30),
lfact AS (SELECT concat(tw.c,'.',tw.s,'.',tw.t) table_full, o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team, r.last_read, tw.lw last_write, tw.tot_writes, CASE WHEN lpo.t IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END po_running, CASE WHEN r.last_read IS NULL OR r.last_read<current_date()-90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END is_unused FROM ltw tw JOIN org o ON o.workspace_id=tw.workspace_id LEFT JOIN lrd r ON r.c=tw.c AND r.s=tw.s AND r.t=tw.t LEFT JOIN lpo ON lpo.c=tw.c AND lpo.s=tw.s AND lpo.t=tw.t),
recs AS (
SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste' tier,'Idle clusters' category,'All-Purpose' compute_type, round(sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd)) est_monthly_savings,'Dashboard' fix_path, concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' clusters, avg CPU ',round(avg(avg_cpu_pct),0),'%') detail FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND avg_cpu_pct<30 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(idle_cpu_cost_usd)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Idle warehouses','SQL', round(sum(idle_cost_usd)),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT warehouse_id),' warehouses, avg util ',round(avg(utilization)*100,0),'%') FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(idle_cost_usd)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Failing jobs','Jobs & Lakeflow', round(sum(failed_cost_usd)),'Dashboard', concat(sum(failed_runs),' failed runs in 30d') FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(failed_cost_usd)>25
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Unused warehouses','SQL', round(sum(cost_usd)),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT warehouse_id),' warehouses with cost but ~0 queries (de-commission)') FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>100 AND sum(coalesce(query_count,0))=0
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Over-frequent jobs','Jobs & Lakeflow', round(sum(job_cost_usd)*0.2),'Dashboard', concat(sum(runs),' runs/30d - consider lower refresh cadence') FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(runs)>1000 AND sum(job_cost_usd)>100
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','Right-size VM / instance type','All-Purpose', round(sum(cost_usd)*0.3),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' clusters low CPU+mem (avg CPU ',round(avg(avg_cpu_pct),0),'%, mem ',round(avg(avg_mem_pct),0),'%) - smaller instance') FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND avg_cpu_pct<20 AND avg_mem_pct<30 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>100
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','Oversized warehouses','SQL', round(sum(cost_usd)*0.3),'Dashboard', concat('avg util ',round(avg(utilization)*100,0),'% on ',max(warehouse_size)) FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND warehouse_size IN ('Large','X-Large','2X-Large','3X-Large','4X-Large') AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING avg(utilization)<0.2 AND sum(cost_usd)>100
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','Jobs on all-purpose compute','Jobs & Lakeflow', round(sum(CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_cost_usd ELSE 0 END)*0.5),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_id END),' jobs on all-purpose') FROM jobe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(CASE WHEN ran_on_apc=1 THEN job_cost_usd ELSE 0 END)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','No spot-with-fallback','All-Purpose', round(sum(cost_usd)*0.3),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' on-demand clusters eligible for spot') FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND is_spot=false AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>100
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Rightsize infra','Autoscaling disabled','All-Purpose', CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE),'Dashboard', concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' fixed-size clusters (min=max)') FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND max_autoscale_workers=min_autoscale_workers AND max_autoscale_workers>1 AND cost_usd>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(cost_usd)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Optimize data & code','High query spill','SQL', CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE),'Genie / Assistant', concat(round(sum(spilled_gb)),' GB spilled - upsize or tune queries (ask Genie)') FROM whe WHERE d>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING sum(spilled_gb)>50
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,workspace_name,'Optimize data & code','Outdated runtime','All-Purpose', CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE),'Genie / Assistant', concat(count(DISTINCT cluster_id),' clusters >=2 LTS behind') FROM clu WHERE d>=current_date()-30 AND major_versions_behind>=2 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING count(DISTINCT cluster_id)>0

UNION ALL SELECT o.lob,o.sub_division,o.team,max(o.workspace_name) workspace_name,'Reduce waste','Set query timeout (long-running queries)','SQL', round(count(*)*0.5),'Dashboard', concat(count(*),' queries ran >1h in 30d - set a statement/query timeout') FROM system.query.history qh JOIN org o USING (workspace_id) WHERE qh.start_time>=current_date()-30 AND qh.total_duration_ms>3600000 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,'—' workspace_name,'Reduce waste' tier,'De-commission unused tables' category,'Data' compute_type, round(count(*)*0.10) est_monthly_savings,'Dashboard' fix_path, concat(count(*),' tables written but not read in 90d') detail FROM lfact WHERE is_unused=1 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
 UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,'—','Optimize data & code','Enable predictive optimization','Data', round(count(*)*0.05),'Dashboard', concat(count(*),' tables without predictive optimization running') FROM lfact WHERE po_running=0 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
 UNION ALL SELECT lob,sub_division,team,'—','Optimize data & code','Optimize frequently-rewritten tables','Data', round(count(*)*0.20),'Genie / Assistant', concat(count(*),' tables rewritten heavily (>500x/90d)') FROM lfact WHERE tot_writes>500 GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING count(*)>0
),
spend AS (SELECT lob,sub_division,team, round(sum(cost_usd)) total_spend FROM priced WHERE usage_date>=current_date()-30 GROUP BY 1,2,3),
agg AS (SELECT lob,sub_division,team, round(sum(CASE WHEN tier='Reduce waste' THEN coalesce(est_monthly_savings,0) ELSE 0 END)) waste_savings, round(sum(CASE WHEN tier='Rightsize infra' THEN coalesce(est_monthly_savings,0) ELSE 0 END)) infra_savings, round(sum(CASE WHEN tier='Optimize data & code' THEN coalesce(est_monthly_savings,0) ELSE 0 END)) data_savings, round(sum(coalesce(est_monthly_savings,0))) total_addressable FROM recs WHERE team IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2,3)
SELECT s.lob,s.sub_division,s.team,s.total_spend, coalesce(a.waste_savings,0) waste_savings, coalesce(a.infra_savings,0) infra_savings, coalesce(a.data_savings,0) data_savings, coalesce(a.total_addressable,0) total_addressable, round(100*(1-least(1, coalesce(a.total_addressable,0)/nullif(s.total_spend,0))),1) efficiency_score, rank() OVER (ORDER BY least(1, coalesce(a.total_addressable,0)/nullif(s.total_spend,0)) ASC) rank_eff FROM spend s LEFT JOIN agg a USING (lob,sub_division,team) WHERE s.total_spend>0 ORDER BY efficiency_score ASC
